Document:
# Bounty Hunter & Assassin This guide will explain the network objectives that members of the Bounty Hunter and Assassin networks will get Bounty Hunters and Assassins get the same objectives, but will not target members of their own network.
## The Hunt If possible you will be assigned a target from a different network to hunt. You must extract their secret phrase. If they wont give it to you voluntarily you can use a secret phrase extractor to force it out. You can obtain a secret phrase extractor from any autolathe. The target must be handcuffed or in a critical or dead state for the extractor to work.
## The Hunter Becomes the Hunted If you are hunted by someone you can enter their secret phrase to compromise them, receiving the reward and neutralizing the hunt.
